transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Sentences and headings arrive in a visibly scrambled order, repeatedly abandoning ideas before their setup appears; concrete examples survive, but no cumulative reading experience or intentional ending remains.
paraphrased_evidence.B: A coherent progression links personal unease, public context, explanatory analogy, method, and instructions, though inflated promises, repeated assertions, and a closing recap make the latter half drag.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Ordered causal progression lets each passage prepare the next, whereas fragment displacement destroys setup, payoff, tonal modulation, and forward expectation even when many individual sentences remain serviceable.
